name: heliora-royaumes
description: Prototype web de strategie 4X fantasy pour Heliora Royaumes.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/networking/network-client.js && node --check src/storage/index.js && node --check src/auth/session.js && node --check src/game-state/index.js && node --check apps/server/src/server.mjs && node --check api/index.mjs && node --check scripts/test-authoritative-server.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-static.mjs && node --check scripts/build-pages.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run audit:static && npm run test:server && npm run build
